title: Europe’s green transition will only succeed if it works for people [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As the European Union prepares to revise its CO₂ emissions standards for cars and vans, the debate is intensifying. Targets, technologies, and timelines are all under scrutiny. But one essential dimension remains too often underrepresented in this discussion: the perspective of the people who ultimately make the transition happen — Europe’s motorists.
